content.explanation: Following the column pattern (Redâ†’Blueâ†’Green), the missing shape must be green. Following the row pattern of shape progression (Triangleâ†’Squareâ†’Pentagon in row 1, Triangleâ†’Diamondâ†’Hexagon in row 2), row 3 shows Triangleâ†’Starâ†’Octagon.

metadata.misconception_targeted: single dimension focus in matrix reasoning

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Student replicates shape from row 1 instead of continuing row 3's progression
